verdict.answer_first: A puts the most critical action first: "1. Turn on automated backups today." B starts with a preliminary check: "Step 0 — Confirm reality first".
verdict.decisiveness: B is more decisive by synthesizing its plan into a single immediate action: "What I'd do right now: kick off a manual `pg_dump -Fc` of Aurora + Supabase".
verdict.fabrication: B invents more business context and a wider set of systems, including "PostHog — SaaS, they own backups" and classifying data as "(revenue/users/UTM)".
verdict.actionability: A is more actionable because its first steps for Aurora ("Turn on automated backups", "Take a manual snapshot") leverage native cloud features and are faster to execute than setting up a `pg_dump` job as B suggests.
